name: Almond Joy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9 x 13 pan, bake the chocolate cake according to directions on the package.
2. In a saucepan, mix together 1 cup evaporated milk, 1 cup sugar, marshmallows, and coconut. Heat until the marshmallows are melted. Pour over the hot cake.
3. In another saucepan, melt the margarine. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups sugar and 1/2 cup evaporated milk. Bring to a boil. Add chocolate chips and stir until they are melted. Then add almonds. Pour this mixture over the cake.
